role: Entry point for all CLI subcommands, routing each command to its dedicated handler.
responsibility: Provides a structured interface for initializing, configuring, synchronizing, fixing, scanning, publishing, and managing the ArchSpine mirror system via command-line operations.

children.role: CLI command adapter for the 'build' operation, orchestrating the build workflow and delegating to core services.
CLI command adapter for the 'check' operation, providing the entry point that delegates to the RuntimeService's CheckService and signals failures via structured errors.
CLI command adapter for configuration management in the ArchSpine system.
CLI command adapter for the 'fix' operation, providing a thin interface to delegate execution to the runtime service's fix subsystem facade.
CLI command adapter for the God Mode feature, handling user warnings and confirmation before delegating to the God engine.

CLI command adapter for the `spine history` subcommand, responsible for parsing arguments, delegating to the Manifest infrastructure for drift history and file documentation retrieval, and formatting the output for terminal display.
CLI command adapter for managing git hook installation, configuration, and execution within the ArchSpine system.
CLI command handler for the 'info' command, acting as a thin adapter that orchestrates the execution of the info report engine.
CLI command orchestrator for initializing the ArchSpine environment, managing documentation language configuration, and coordinating repository and runtime bootstrap.
CLI command adapter for interactive documentation language configuration management in the ArchSpine system.
CLI command adapter for interactive LLM provider, model, and runtime configuration.
CLI command adapter for starting the ArchSpine Model Context Protocol (MCP) server.
CLI command handler orchestrating the publish workflow for the ArchSpine mirror system, coordinating preflight checks, sync, document backfill, and manifest state management.
CLI command adapter for the 'remove' operation, orchestrating the cleanup of ArchSpine-managed artifacts from a repository.
CLI command adapter/router for repository-level operations in the ArchSpine system.
CLI command adapter for the 'scan' operation, parsing command-line options and delegating scanning to the Scanner engine.

CLI command adapter that orchestrates the display of synchronization status for the ArchSpine mirror system, acting as a thin entry point that delegates status retrieval to the runtime service and formats console output.

CLI command adapter that orchestrates the complete synchronization workflow for the ArchSpine mirror system, including argument parsing, spine gate enforcement, repair policy evaluation, and execution checkpoint management.
CLI command adapter for the 'try' preview command, handling filesystem validation, configuration parsing, and user feedback.
CLI command adapter for executing the usage report, defined as the usage command entry point.
CLI command adapter for the `view` subcommand, handling view selection, display, and protected output baseline writes within the ArchSpine system.
